subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí-Ḥaydar! Upon thee be My glory! The honoured Amín, upon him be My glory, hath arrived and made mention of thee and the friends of that land [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی حیدر علیک بهائی جناب امین علیه بهائی وارد ذکر شما و دوستان آن ارض را
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayer for strength, @prayer for service, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
